---
title: Introduction to Databases and Information Systems
description: |
  **Delivery mode:** Online (self-paced independent learning)
  
  **Start date:** Anytime
  
  **Cost:** Free
  
  **Duration:** 2 weeks
image: website-hosting-concept-with-circuits.jpg
site-url:
open-graph: true
twitter-card: true
---
::: {.profile-image-float-left}
![](website-hosting-concept-with-circuits.jpg){fig-align="centre"}
:::
## About the course

In this Byte Size Learning course, we offer an introduction to databases, information systems, and the most common language used to interact with databases: SQL. There are examples that you can follow along using the provided database (demo_hospital.db) and some fill-in-the-blank exercises throughout. 

We recommend downloading DB Browser for SQLite to code in SQL and interact with our demo database. Instructions are provided in the course learning materials.   

For more information and enrollment options, please click [here](https://shortcourses.ed.ac.uk/course/introduction-to-databases-and-information-systems)

*Course [image](https://www.freepik.com/free-photo/website-hosting-concept-with-circuits_26412535.htm) by Freepick, 2025, free to use on Freepick.*
